Accenture.desc: Selection notification followed by access to the Workday onboarding portal for tasks.
Intense review of educational records. Once verified, you get a 'Green Status' mail.
Self-learning modules on software engineering fundamentals. Followed by a primer assessment.
Official joining date confirmation based on business demand and location selection.
Onboarding induction at the office, asset issuance, and project tagging setup.

Cognizant.desc: Received after clearing the interview rounds. Acceptance is required within 3-7 days.
Mandatory enablement training on tech stacks (Java, C#, Python, QA, etc.) via platforms like Udemy/Internal portals.
Formal employment offer containing compensation breakdown and tentative joining date.
Upload degree certificates, PAN, Aadhaar, and background check authorization on the onboarding portal.
Physical or virtual induction, asset allocation (laptop setup), and assignment of employee ID.

TCS.desc: Receipt of NQT scorecard and interview completion mail.
Generated on the TCS NextStep portal. Must download, sign, and upload acceptance.
Assigned batch for digital or physical learning at a TCS center. Covers coding, Agile, and soft skills.
Final date and location of joining, including ILP center details.
Service Agreement uploading (usually requires stamp papers and guarantor signature) and medical certificate submissions.
